text: Adjusted income: deductions wholly and exclusively incurred in the production of gross income are allowable.
Special provisions applicable to adjusted income from a business — further/specific deductions allowable in ascertaining adjusted income.
Deductions not allowed, including certain private and capital expenditure and a portion of entertainment expenditure.
Capital allowances: initial and annual allowances on qualifying plant and machinery and industrial buildings, in lieu of depreciation.
Total income: aggregation of statutory income, set-off of current-year losses, and deduction of approved donations and gifts.
Classes of income chargeable to tax: gains or profits from a business, employment, dividends/interest/discounts, rents/royalties/premiums, pensions/annuities, and other income.
Special classes of income of a non-resident: amounts for services, technical advice, and the use of movable property — chargeable and subject to withholding.
Basis period to which gross income from a business is related, including treatment of debts, stock in trade, and advance receipts.
Return of income by a company (Form C): every company must furnish a return in the prescribed form for a year of assessment.
Estimate of tax payable (CP204) and payment by monthly instalments, including revision of the estimate.
Withholding tax on special classes of income (s.4A) paid to a non-resident; the payer must deduct and remit the tax.
Transfer pricing: transactions between associated persons must be at arm's length; the DGIR may make adjustments and require contemporaneous documentation.
Penalty for failure to furnish return or give notice of chargeability.
Penalty for incorrect returns or understatement of income, including for omitting or understating chargeable income.
Repairs and renewals: expenditure to restore an asset to its original condition is deductible under s.33(1); expenditure that improves or enlarges an asset is capital and not deductible.
source: LHDN Public Ruling No. 6/2019 — Tax Treatment on Expenditure for Repairs and Renewals of Assets
